name: Shopify
description: Shopify is a leading e-commerce platform providing a REST Admin API to manage online stores. Agents can programmatically manage products, orders, customers, inventory, fulfillments, collections, webhooks, and shop settings across Shopify storefronts.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products from the store with filtering by collection, type, vendor, status, and dates.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single product by ID with all variants, images, and metafields.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product with title, description, variants, pricing, images, and inventory details.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing product's title, description, variants, images, or status.

capabilities.name: products_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a product from the store by its ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with filtering by status, financial status, fulfillment status, and date ranges.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific order including line items, shipping, payment, and fulfillment status.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order with line items, customer info, shipping address, and payment details.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing order's note, tags, shipping address, or email.

capabilities.name: orders_close
capabilities.description: Close a completed order to prevent further edits.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with search by name or email and filtering by dates.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific customer including addresses and order history.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer with email, name, addresses, and marketing consent.

capabilities.name: inventory_levels_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve inventory levels for items at specific locations.

capabilities.name: inventory_levels_adjust
capabilities.description: Adjust inventory quantity for a variant at a specific location.

capabilities.name: fulfillments_create
capabilities.description: Create a fulfillment for an order with tracking number, URL, and carrier information.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve custom collections and smart collections from the store.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks for the store.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook subscription for store events.

capabilities.name: shop_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the shop's general settings including name, domain, currency, and timezone.
